events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the iconic Brian May! His distinctive guitar work shaped the sound of Queen and continues to inspire generations.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Still Got The Moves
angles.copy: 83 years young and still commanding the stage! Happy birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger, a true rock and roll force of nature.

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched, forever changing the music landscape. And yes, the first video played was 'Video Killed The Radio Star' by The Buggles – the irony is still golden.

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Britpop Classic
angles.copy: A true Britpop landmark! 32 years ago today, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and instantly cemented their place in rock history. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, an iconic event of the 1960s counterculture, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since the fields of Bethel, New York, became synonymous with '3 Days of Peace & Music'. The Woodstock Festival truly captured a generation.

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley, would have been 91
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91.

angles.name: The King's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the King today, 49 years since we lost Elvis Presley. His music and charisma continue to resonate, proving he's still very much in the building.

events.title: Remembering Tupac Shakur, would have been 55
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the tragic death of influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who would have been 55.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Icon
angles.copy: 30 years ago, the music world lost a true visionary. Remembering Tupac Shakur today, whose powerful lyrics and artistry continue to define an era.

events.title: Remembering Jimi Hendrix, would have been 84
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84.

angles.name: Guitar Genius
angles.copy: 56 years ago, the world lost a musical pioneer. Remembering Jimi Hendrix, whose revolutionary guitar playing still sounds as fresh and electrifying today.

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Crossing
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover, those tracks... pure timeless genius. What's your favourite from it?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Rock & Roll Rebel
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! Her fierce vocals and songwriting with The Pretenders continue to be an inspiration.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Former Oasis frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Biblical Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that rock 'n' roll swagger. As you were.

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' album turns 55
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic 'Imagine' album was released in the UK on October 8, 1971.

angles.name: A World United
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon released the timeless 'Imagine' album. Its message of peace and unity resonates just as strongly today.

events.title: The first iPod was unveiled 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the original iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: 1000 Songs In Your Pocket
angles.copy: 25 years ago today, Apple introduced the world to the iPod. It put 1,000 songs in your pocket and completely changed how we listen to music.

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the release date of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: 007 Day
angles.copy: Grab your martini, shaken not stirred! It's James Bond Day – celebrating the enduring legacy of Britain's most famous secret agent.

events.title: Remembering John Lennon, would have been 86
events.blurb: Today would have been the 86th birthday of The Beatles' co-founder John Lennon.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember John Lennon. His music and message of peace continue to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: British comedy legend John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: And Now For Something Completely Different
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the incomparable John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, his comedic genius is truly timeless.
